rationale: The cited paper appears only as a single supporting reference in the discussion, where the authors suggest that future work could include mindset metrics (e.g., price-quality schema) in econometric models. The citing study does not build its conceptual framework, hypotheses, model specification, variables, or estimation strategy on Srinivasan et al. (2010). Its core contribution is cross-national elasticities for line length, price, and distribution, with no direct integration of the cited paper's framework.
